title: dichrocephala integrifolia subsp. integrifolia
intro: Dichrocephala integrifolia subsp. integrifolia, also known as the yellow flowered dichrocephala, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Dichrocephala integrifolia subsp. integrifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves are often used in traditional remedies.
